settings.text: A clean AirPods case that stays low-key in daylight and glows softly when the room goes dark.

settings.heading: For every low-light moment
settings.text: Whether it's your nightstand, a dimmed office, or a late-night commute - it just works.

settings.title: Instantly visible in the dark
settings.text: No more fumbling around - find your AirPods case the second the lights go out.

settings.title: Premium glowing aesthetic
settings.text: A soft phosphorescent finish that looks stunning in low-light without being flashy.

settings.title: Full protection, zero bulk
settings.text: Shock-absorbent material guards against drops, scratches, and everyday wear.

settings.title: Ultra-lightweight and portable
settings.text: Barely adds any weight and slides into your pocket just like your bare AirPods case.
I keep finding my AirPods instantly now, even in a pitch-black room. Game changer.
settings.author: Alex M.

settings.text: It looks premium in daylight and the glow at night is honestly beautiful. Friends always ask about it.
settings.author: Jordan K.

settings.text: Super lightweight, fits perfectly, and the glow is subtle. Love the blue one.
settings.author: Sam T.

settings.heading: People can't stop talking about it

settings.question: How long does the glow last?
settings.answer: After full light exposure, the glow lasts 2-4 hours at its brightest, then gradually fades. A few minutes under any light source recharges it.

settings.question: Which AirPods models does it fit?
settings.answer: The case is compatible with popular AirPods charging cases. Use your Shopify product options or description for exact model compatibility.

settings.question: Does it interfere with wireless charging?
settings.answer: No. The case is designed to work with both wireless and wired charging without removing it.

settings.heading: Ready to glow?
settings.text: Join thousands of happy customers. Pick your color and never lose your AirPods in the dark again.
